verses.text: Maangmuhna Kuam tawh kisai thu hih bangin gen hi: Kikona tawh a kidim, a gamlum khuapi, lungdamin a diang khua aw, note khempeuh, innkhumzangah na kah toh uh bang na cihnopna uh ahi hiam? A kithat nangma mite pen namsau tawh a kithat hilo a, galsunga si hilo uh hi
Note hong uk mite tai uh a, thal zat kulloin amaute kiman hi. Gamlapi-ah na tai uh hangin hong kimu note khempeuh hong kiman hi
Tua ahih ciangin keimah in, “Kei hong en kei un la, khitui tampi luangin hong kapkap sak un. Ka mi tampi a sihna hangin keimah hehnep ding hong hanciam kei un,” ka ci hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh Vanglian Topa Pasian in Maangmuhna Kuam sungah buaina leh tuatcil gawpna, kitawhzauna, kulhte suksiat gawpna leh mualte tungah kikona hong tungsak hi
Sakol leengte leh sakol tung tuangte tawh Elam galkapte in thallawng pua uh a, Kir galkapte in a lumte uh a baihsa-in nei uh hi
Nomau' teel Judah kuamte sakol leeng tawh kidim a, sakol tung tuangte in Jerusalem kulhkongpite-ah a pang uh hi
Judah a kihutna teng khempeuh kicim khinta hi. Tua ni ciangin Tulak Inn sunga kikoih galhiamte na suang ding a
David khuapi mun tampi tak a siatna mu-in, bual nuainung tuite na cingkik a
nangmah in Jerusalem innte a phazah simin, kulhpi siate puahna dingin innte na phel hi
Nangmah in, bual lui pana tuite kholna dingin kulhpi nih kikalah tuibempi khat na bawl hi. Ahih hangin nangmah in, tua na a na bawlpa phawkloin, sawtpekin a na geelpa na don kei hi
Tua ni ciangin Vanglian Topa Pasian in kahna leh thumna, sam mettolna leh puanhampi silhna a zang dingin thu hong pia hi
Ahih hangin note in lungdamna leh kipahna, bawngtalte leh tuute gawhna, sa nekna leh leenggahzu nekna na nei zawsop uh a, “Zing ciangin si ding ihih ciangin nene-in dawndawn ni,” na ci zawsop uh hi
Vanglian Topa in keima tungah thu hong gen a, “Na sih matengun hih mawhna hong kimaisak hetlo ding hi,” Vanglian Topa Pasian in hong ci hi.
Tua ahih ciangin Vanglian Topa Pasian in, “Hong pai in. Innsung na teng a uk, neihsa kempa Shebna kiangah pai in la ama tungah hih bangin gen in
Hih lai-ah nangma-a' ding hankhuk a to, a sangna munah hankhuk a bawl, na omna ding suang a khuak mipa aw, nang in hih lai-ah bang hih a, vui ding kua nei na hi hiam
En in, nang mi thatpa aw, Topa in nang hong lawnkhia gawp ding hi. Amah in nakpi takin nang hong lenin
hong pingpei ding a, lei tanzau munah bawlung bangin hong lawn ding hi. Na topa' inn sung-a' dingin maizumna ahi nang pen tua munah si-in, na kisaktheihpih na sakol leengte lakah na tuk ding hi
Na nasepna phual panin nang kong nawtkhia ding a, na omna panin nang hong kilawnkhia suk ding hi
“Tua ni ciangin Hikiah' tapa ahi ka nasempa Eliakim ka sam ding a
nangma puantualpi amah silhsakin, nangma kawnggak tawh amah ka gak ding a, nangma ukna ama tungah ka pia ding hi. Amah pen Jerusalem khua-a teng mite leh Judah mite tungah pa hi ding hi
David' suanlekhakte' khutnuai-ah aana neihna tawhtang, ama tungah ka pia ding hi. Amah in hongin, kuamah in khak zolo ding hi. Amah in khakin, kuamah in hong zolo ding hi
Amah pen a kician mun khatah vankhaina bangin ka khenkip ding a, ama beh sungah pahtawi ngahna phungpi a suak ding hi
“Ahi zongin a beh a phung, a suan a khakte khempeuh ama-a' dingin van gikpi hi ding a, umlebeel, kuanglekeute, hai-a kipan thawl dongin van khaina-ah a kikhai bangin ama tungah kibom ding uh hi
Tua ni ciangin mun hoihna-a a kikhen vankhai in lel ding hi. Topa in gen khin ahih ciangin, amah pen kitanin kia ding a, ama tunga vangik kikhai teng kisia ding hi,” Vanglian Topa in hong ci hi.
